creator: ruben@verweg.com
text:
I see that in the meantime a new port has appeared, too bad they  
didn't contact the maintainer of sysutils/linux-megacli

I think it is confusing for end users of the original port to see it  
disappear and then reappear by another maintainer without a clear  
reason. There might be some fixes in this port sysutils/linux-megacli2  
does not have. I leave it to portsmgr@ on which port continues to exist.

Regards,
	Ruben

On 26 Jan 2009, at 18:56, pgollucci@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: Update sysutils/linux-megacli to 2.00.15
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
